label: AppleScript • scripted read classification (no over-block)
query: What is the current track name, and how many notes are there?
notes: Model-free CI guard against classifier over-blocking. Reads that LOOK write-ish — a local `set <var> to <property> of …` assignment, and a `count of …` read — must classify as `read`, auto-run in query mode, and never be blocked as mutations. Guards the effect classifier's `set … to … of` (assignment, not property write) handling so a benign read isn't refused. No tokens.

scriptedCalls: {"script":"set trackName to name of current track\nreturn trackName"}
